title: Offset
description: Offset: Class defining offsets for bar objects from its end Nodes to be applied in analysis packages.

Start.description: Defines offset of the StartNode in local coordinates. This is x - tangential, z- along normal (generally major axis), y - perpendicular to the first two (generally minor axis). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

End.description: Defines offset of the EndNode in local coordinates. This is x - tangential, z- along normal (generally major axis), y - perpendicular to the first two (generally minor axis). Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m]. Vector: Defines a direction and magnitude in three-dimensional Euclidean space.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
